episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: Cases of under-aged girls getting married go unnoticed at Talabkatta where a new policeman Bhanu has been transferred. Shehnaz, a survivor changes her approach in saving the girls. Asif is forced by his wife to start working with Jawad
